reviews.school_name: Ramagya World School - Block I,Delta II
reviews.author: Monalisa Bhati
reviews.review_body:
Tbh i don't wanna give it a single star. Worst school I've ever seen
It doesn't have a thing called management
My daughter didn't got her maths book in 6th STD , computers book in 7th STD and Sanskrit book in 8std
Transport facility is really bad a big zero for it. They have stopped all the activities, dancing, singing, and sports from class 4th 8th
This is ramagya works school

reviews.school_name: Ramagya World School - Block I,Delta II
reviews.author: Dr. Reetu
reviews.review_body: Teachers are friendly but the service are very bad. No importantance of timing, no proper schedule, bad conversation with parents. My daughter is waiting for school bus for one hour continuously from three days. Bus driver dont know the exact rout from where the childrens pic and drop. There is not any person who concern about your problems. Don't recieve phone call if you have any complain. If I know all these things before going to take admission of my child I'll never go for it.

reviews.school_name: Ramagya World School - Block I,Delta II
reviews.author: Kanu Bhati
reviews.review_body: Everything is organized inside and out. Also, the school ensures to provide maximum safety to the kids when it comes to handling them to their family, only people that are registered are allowed to take the child home other than the parents themselves. Activities to make the child developed in every aspect is thier one of the main focuses. All in all the school is amazing.
